# Exegete

> Pre-PEXA pre-settlement security for Australian property and estate transactions. Self-serve audits and consultative retainers for trusted advisors and high-value clients.

Exegete operates the DRMO (Digital Risk Management Officer) service, protecting the human layer around property and estate transactions in the 3-4 weeks before they reach PEXA. Each door page below targets one specific buyer × location × threat × service-shape combination.

Productised L1 (atomic check, $99-$249) and L2 (workflow pack, $299-$999) services are self-serve via Stripe. Consultative L3 retainer / L4 enterprise services are by Calendly discovery call.

Source-policy: every claim on every door page traces to a primary public Australian regulator source (AUSTRAC, OAIC, ACSC, ARNECC, ASIC, etc.) cited inline.

Operator: Andre Fabre, Perth WA. Background: 10 years GRC delivery (Rio Tinto, VGW, WA Department of Finance). Currently studying Bachelor of IT (Cyber Security major) at Murdoch University. Sec+ exam targeted June 2026.

## Boutique Firm

- [Email Authentication Check for Perth Boutique Firms: Close the SPF/DMARC/DKIM Gap That Lets BEC Impersonate Your Domain](https://exegete.com.au/drmo/boutique-firms/perth/privacy-act-bec/): Your firm has under ten staff. You don't have an in-house IT team, your mail runs on Microsoft 365 or Google Workspace, and your domain was set up years ago by whoever built the website. If an attacker can send email that looks like it came
- [Identity Verification Protocol Template for Perth Boutique Firms: A Privacy Act-Aligned Client ID Workflow](https://exegete.com.au/drmo/boutique-firms/perth/privacy-act-client-identity-theft/): You run a firm of under ten staff. You take on new clients most weeks, and each one hands you a driver's licence, a passport scan, or a Medicare card by email. Nobody on your team has time to design a verification workflow from scratch, but
- [Pre-Settlement Flash Audit for Perth Boutique Firms: Detect Deepfake-Voice Wire Instructions Before Funds Move](https://exegete.com.au/drmo/boutique-firms/perth/privacy-act-deepfake-voice-instructions/): A partner at your firm gets a voicemail. It sounds exactly like the client — same cadence, same Perth accent, same way they always say "mate" at the end. The message asks you to update the trust account details for tomorrow's settlement and
- [Pre-Settlement Flash Audit for Perth Boutique Firms: Detect Settlement Hijack Indicators Before Funds Move](https://exegete.com.au/drmo/boutique-firms/perth/privacy-act-settlement-hijack/): You run a small firm — under ten staff, a handful of active settlement matters at any time, and no in-house IT or security function. The matter is days out. Someone — purportedly the other side — has emailed amended trust account details, o
- [Pre-Settlement Flash Audit for Perth Boutique Firms: Catch Wire-Transfer Fraud Indicators Before Funds Move](https://exegete.com.au/drmo/boutique-firms/perth/privacy-act-wire-fraud/): Your firm has eight people. One settlement runs at a time, the partner signs off trust transfers, and the same paralegal handles client correspondence end-to-end. When a payment instruction lands late in the week with revised account detail

## Conveyancer

Your firm sends and receives payment instructions, client authorisations and verification of identity correspondence by email every day. If a Brisbane buyer ever receives a spoo
- [Verification of Identity Template for Brisbane Conveyancers: A Reasonable-Steps Protocol Aligned to ARNECC Model Participation Rules](https://exegete.com.au/drmo/conveyancers/brisbane/arnecc-msp-client-identity-theft/): You know the Verification of Identity step matters. You also know that when a file goes wrong — a forged driver's licence, a substituted seller, a fraudulent power of attorney — the question the Registrar asks is not "did you check ID?" but
- [Pre-Settlement Flash Audit for Brisbane Conveyancers: Detect Deepfake-Voice Wire Instructions Before Settlement](https://exegete.com.au/drmo/conveyancers/brisbane/arnecc-msp-deepfake-voice-instructions/): The phone rings two days before settlement. It's "your client" — same voice, same cadence, audibly stressed — asking you to update the trust account details for the deposit return. The call-back number they offer is new. Your settlement tea
- [Pre-Settlement Flash Audit for Brisbane Conveyancers: Detect Settlement Hijack Indicators Before You Sign Off in PEXA](https://exegete.com.au/drmo/conveyancers/brisbane/arnecc-msp-settlement-hijack/): You're three days from settlement on a Brisbane file. The Subscriber on the other side of the workspace has just nominated a different trust account for the seller's proceeds. The signing window is open and the line manager wants you to loc
- [Pre-Settlement Wire-Fraud Flash Audit for Brisbane Conveyancers: Verify Disbursement Instructions Against ARNECC Rules Before Settlement](https://exegete.com.au/drmo/conveyancers/brisbane/arnecc-msp-wire-fraud/): A Queensland settlement is locked for Thursday. ## Estate Lawyer

- [Email Security Check for Australian Estate Planning Lawyers: SPF, DMARC and DKIM Posture Against BEC](https://exegete.com.au/drmo/estate-lawyers/au/privacy-act-bec/): You hold the most sensitive personal information your clients will ever share — wills, beneficiary details, asset schedules, family disputes — and most of it moves through email. ## Principal

## Operator services (consultative)

- [DRMO Retainer (ongoing) — $1,000/month](https://exegete.com.au/drmo/services/retainer/): Monthly cyber hygiene + BEC monitoring + quarterly AUSTRAC reporting + business-hours incident response. 6-month minimum. Calendly discovery call.
- [PEXA Pre-Settlement Shield (one-time) — $3,000](https://exegete.com.au/drmo/services/shield/): 2-week consulting engagement covering email security audit, BEC detection setup, identity verification protocol design, PEXA access control review. Calendly discovery call.
- [Enterprise DRMO — $5,000-$10,000/month](https://exegete.com.au/drmo/services/enterprise/): Retainer plus staff training, advanced AI detection, blockchain audit trail, custom integrations, dedicated account manager. 12-month minimum.
